title: Cooking Converter - Recipe Unit Conversion
seoDescription: Free online cooking measurement converter. Convert cups to ml, tbsp to tsp, ounces to grams, Fahrenheit to Celsius, and more. Perfect for recipes, baking, and international cooking. All conversions in your browser.
howToUseTitle: How to Use the Cooking Converter
step1Desc: Type the amount you want to convert. You can use decimal numbers like 1.5 or 0.25 for fractions.
step2Desc: Choose the source unit (from) and target unit (to). Switch between Volume, Weight, and Temperature tabs for different measurement types.
step3Desc: Click Convert to see the converted amount instantly. Use the result in your cooking or baking recipe.
faq1A: Yes — all conversions use standard culinary conversion factors (1 cup = 236.588 ml, 1 oz = 28.3495 g, etc.).
faq2Q: What is the difference between US and UK cups?
faq2A: This tool uses US customary units. A US cup is 236.588 ml. UK/Imperial cups are 284.131 ml.
faq3Q: Can I convert between volume and weight?
faq3A: Volume-to-weight conversion depends on ingredient density. This tool focuses on within-category conversions (volume↔volume, weight↔weight).
